title: Stabilize commerce-owner E2E and promote back to @p0

tasks.title: Diagnose the apps/e2e web prod-build blocker (validateWebEnv)
tasks.description: Root-cause why bringing up the local apps/e2e stack fails: the web prod-env build throws at validateWebEnv requiring PUBLIC_SENTRY_DSN and PUBLIC_POSTHOG_KEY. Read apps/web env validation (validateWebEnv) and the apps/e2e Playwright webServer config to confirm whether the E2E web build runs in production mode and which PUBLIC_* vars it demands. Output: a short written diagnosis (which vars, why prod mode, the 2 candidate fixes — supply build env vs run web in dev mode). No tests (investigation task); deliverable is the diagnosis note used by T-002.

subtasks.title: Read validateWebEnv and identify required PUBLIC_* vars
Inspect apps/e2e Playwright webServer build/run config
Write diagnosis: prod-mode cause + 2 candidate fixes

tasks.title: Unblock the local apps/e2e stack bring-up
tasks.description: Apply the chosen fix from T-001 so the 3-server apps/e2e harness starts locally and `e2e:up` (or the documented equivalent) works. Either (a) provide the missing PUBLIC_* build env for the E2E web build with safe placeholder values, or (b) tweak the Playwright webServer config to run web in dev mode for E2E. Prefer the option that does NOT weaken prod-build validation for the real web app. Verify by bringing the stack up and confirming all 3 servers reach healthy. Test: a documented command sequence that reproducibly brings the stack up (captured for AC-1 / T-009).

subtasks.title: Implement chosen env/webServer fix
Bring stack up locally, confirm 3 servers healthy
Capture the working command sequence

tasks.title: Run commerce-01 locally with a Playwright trace
tasks.description: With the stack up (T-002), run apps/e2e/tests/commerce/commerce-01-owner-edits-listings.spec.ts locally with trace/video enabled. Capture the trace, DOM snapshot, and network log around the save → protected PATCH that never fires in headless CI. Deliverable: the trace artifact + a note on what the editor island does on interaction (hydration, mount, event firing). No new tests; this is evidence gathering for T-004.

subtasks.title: Run commerce-01 with trace+video on
Capture DOM/network evidence around the save PATCH

tasks.title: Root-cause the editor dirty-tracking / no-PATCH issue
tasks.description: From the T-003 trace, determine why CommerceListingEditor.client.tsx's `dirty` set stays empty under Playwright in headless mode (canSave=false → no PATCH). Evaluate the candidates from the spec: hydration not actually awaited, island re-mounting, a controlled-input wrapper needing focus/composition events, value set on the wrong element, or Astro client:load vs client:visible nuance. Deliverable: a confirmed root cause. If the trace reveals a genuine product/UX bug instead of a test-harness issue, document it and raise separately (out of scope per spec §5).

subtasks.title: Analyze trace against the 5 candidate causes
Confirm single root cause
If product bug: document + flag for separate fix

tasks.title: Apply the real fix to commerce-01
tasks.description: Implement the fix identified in T-004 so the save reliably dirties the form and fires the protected PATCH in headless mode. The fix lives in the test/interaction layer (apps/e2e/tests/commerce/commerce-01-owner-edits-listings.spec.ts and/or shared E2E helpers) unless T-004 proved a product bug. Verify: commerce-01 passes ≥3 consecutive local runs with the stack from T-002.

subtasks.title: Implement the interaction/test fix
Confirm PATCH fires + ficha reflects edit
Run commerce-01 x3 consecutive green locally

tasks.title: Re-validate commerce-02 (access control) under the fixed harness
tasks.description: Run apps/e2e/tests/commerce/commerce-02-access-control.spec.ts (tourist blocked + cross-owner blocked) under the T-002 harness with the T-005 fix applied. Apply the same interaction fix if the access-control assertions depend on it. Verify: commerce-02 passes reliably (≥3 consecutive local runs).

subtasks.title: Run commerce-02 under fixed harness
Apply interaction fix if needed
Confirm x3 consecutive green locally

tasks.title: Promote commerce-01 & commerce-02 @p1 -> @p0
tasks.description: Change the Playwright tags on both specs from @p1 back to @p0 so they gate e2e-pr's e2e:test:p0 run. Update any tag references / annotations in apps/e2e/tests/commerce/*.spec.ts and remove the SPEC-252 follow-up debt note now that it's paid. Verify locally that the p0 selector picks up both specs.

subtasks.title: Swap @p1 -> @p0 on both specs
Remove the SPEC-252 deprioritization note
Confirm p0 selector matches both

tasks.title: Confirm e2e-pr's e2e:test:p0 runs and passes both specs
tasks.description: Open the PR (or push) and confirm the e2e-pr workflow's e2e:test:p0 job now runs commerce-01 and commerce-02 and passes them green in headless CI. If flaky, iterate with the trace from the local harness. Satisfies AC-4: both specs gate e2e-pr and pass.

subtasks.title: Trigger e2e-pr with the changes
Confirm e2e:test:p0 includes + passes both specs

tasks.title: Document the local E2E run procedure + dirty-tracking gotcha
tasks.description: Write the runbook: the exact command sequence to bring up apps/e2e locally and run the commerce specs with a trace (from T-002), plus the root cause + fix for the controlled-input dirty-tracking gotcha (from T-004/T-005) so future contributors don't re-derive it. Place in the appropriate docs/ guide and/or apps/e2e README. Satisfies AC-1 documentation + spec §7.5.

subtasks.title: Document local e2e:up + commerce trace run
Document the dirty-tracking root cause + fix
